subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison. Verily, He is the Truth, the Knower of things unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه هو الحق علام الغیوب امروز
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement
